calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Trustee And Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Christen Bourne, for Exchange Bank, Petitioner.

The court asks whether there are any objections to this petition. Counsel reports that no objections are known to them and none are presented in open court.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Ramirez. Not Reported.

Petition For Instructions To Trustee And Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dylan Recht, Esq. counsel for Antoinette Gump Amorteguy, beneficiary; Le Duong, Esq. counsel for Bank of the West, proposed successor Trustee; Mara Mahana, Esq., counsel for current income beneficiaries [excepting Antoinette Gump Amorteguy]; Ernest Der, Esq., guardian ad litem for minor contingent remainder beneficiaries.

[Heard with related case PTR-19-302869]

The Court notes at the outset that based upon subsequent filings, it would appear that the resignation/appointing successor trustee petition in this case can be dismissed due to a similar petition pending in the related case [PTR-19-302869] and that the Petition for Instructions can be granted. Mr. Recht offers further explication on the respective petitions as does Ms. Duong. Ms. Mahana and Mr. Der, on behalf of their respective clients, concur with the Court's assessment. With respect to the resignation/appointing successor trustee petition in PTR-19-302869, Adolph Gump Testamentary Trust, all agree that this petition can be granted.

After further discussion, the Court dismisses the Petition Accepting Resignation and Appointing Successor Trustee in PTR-11-294596, grants the Petition for Instructions, etc.in PTR-11-294596, and grants the Petition Accepting Resignation and Appointing Successor Trustee in PTR-19-302869, subject to written order and review of the same.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody; Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not
Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (D204)

Petition For Instruction And Order To Divide And Combine Antoinette Gump Amorteguy'S Interest In Certain Sub-Trusts Into Her Remaining Sub-Trusts
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dylan Recht, Esq. counsel for Antoinette Gump Amorteguy, beneficiary; Le Duong, Esq. counsel for Bank of the West, proposed successor Trustee; Mara Mahana, Esq., counsel for current income beneficiaries [excepting Antoinette Gump Amorteguy]; Ernest Der, Esq., guardian ad litem for minor contingent remainder beneficiaries.

[Heard with related case PTR-19-302869]

The Court notes at the outset that based upon subsequent filings, it would appear that the resignation/appointing successor trustee petition in this case can be dismissed due to a similar petition pending in the related case [PTR-19-302869] and that the Petition for Instructions can be granted. Mr. Recht offers further explication on the respective petitions as does Ms. Duong. Ms. Mahana and Mr. Der, on behalf of their respective clients, concur with the Court's assessment. With respect to the resignation/appointing successor trustee petition in PTR-19-302869, Adolph Gump Testamentary Trust, all agree that this petition can be granted.

After further discussion, the Court dismisses the Petition Accepting Resignation and Appointing Successor Trustee in PTR-11-294596, grants the Petition for Instructions, etc.in PTR-11-294596, and grants the Petition Accepting Resignation and Appointing Successor Trustee in PTR-19-302869, subject to written order and review of the same.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody; Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not
Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (D204)

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Continued To Nov-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dylan Recht for Antoinette G. Amorteguy. Britt Robert for Bank of the West.

The Court addressed the petition and stated that today's focus is on Antoinette Gump, the subtrusts, and the derivative shares. Extensive discussions with regard to Antoinette's requests to appoint First Republic as successor trustee are held. The Court stated that Marilyn and Tony moved all interests to Bank of the West and that Antoinette is seeking to move all of her interests to First Republic. Ms. Roberts stated that Bank of the West would hang on to the interests of the other beneficiaries. Mr. Recht stated that Tony was the last living beneficiary of the testamentary trust when the original beneficiaries consolidated instead of distributing assets, that they created derivative shares, that the derivative shares have their own tax identifications, and that they can be transferred over easily. The Court stated that it is easy when everything is controlled by one trustee. Mr. Recht stated that there is no issue with Bank of the West holding for the beneficiaries except as to Antionette. Mr. Recht stated that the accountings are done and that he will have a petition for approval on file this week. The Court continued the Petition for Order Accepting Resignation of Trustee and Appointing Successor Trustee and the Partial Objection and Petition to November 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it expected an amendment with additional specific information on the trusts that are involved and a petition to confirm the accounting to be filed. The Court noted that it was continuing this matter with the understanding that there may be a new petition filed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
